description: A task associated with a change request.

sys_id.description: Unique identifier for the change task.

short_description.description: A brief summary of the task.

state.description: The current state of the task.

assigned_to.description: The sys_id of the assigned user.

change_request.description: The sys_id of the parent change request.

planned_start_date.description: The planned start date for the task.

planned_end_date.description: The planned end date for the task.

title: ChangeTask
